title: Addy Osmani's 24 Production Agent Skills Pack — Slash Commands, Verification Gates & Anti-Hallucination Loops
description: A comprehensive pack of 24 production engineering skills that turn AI agents into disciplined builders — spec writing, task decomposition, verification gates, and anti-rationalization tables. Deploying across 70+ agents including Cursor and Claude Code with slash commands like /spec, /plan, /build, /test, /review, and /ship. The big shift: pure 'prompt engineering' is out — modular skills with embedded verification loops are in.

title: The 3-Part Agent Identity Prompt: Role → Objective → Output Format for Claude Agents
description: A foundational template for creating consistent, scoped AI agents using a structured Role + Rules + Output Format pattern. The prompt enforces Summary → Analysis → Action Items → Next Steps response structure and explicitly prioritizes accuracy over speed with built-in verification requirements. The template is designed to be adapted for any domain by swapping the role and skills.

title: Multi-Skill Operator Templates: Risk Brief, Financial Stress Test & Devil's Advocate Pre-Mortem
description: Battle-tested templates that turn a single agent into a multi-expert system — contract risk analysis, financial stress testing, pre-mortem critiques, and market research handoffs. Each template specifies exact deliverables, constraints, and output formats for real business use cases. The templates emphasize 'explain like I'm smart, not a CFO' clarity and include counter-proposals with every critique.

title: AGENTS.md: The Persistent Context File That Stops You Repeating Yourself to Every AI Session
description: A drop-in project context template (AGENTS.md or .hermes.md) that auto-loads your stack, conventions, architecture, and critical rules into every new agent session. Covers frontend/backend specs, database config, deployment details, coding conventions, and hard constraints in one file. The trend reflects the broader shift from one-shot prompts to persistent context engineering.

title: Viral Graphite Pencil Sketch: Museum-Grade Identity-Locked Portrait Prompt
description: A trending identity-preservation prompt that produces hyper-realistic graphite pencil sketches with visible construction lines, cross-hatching, and artistic unfinished details — all while locking the subject's exact facial structure. Working across GPT Image 2, Grok/Flux, and Gemini, the prompt opens with a strict identity-anchoring clause and includes detailed negative prompts. Variations include stippling ink and rose-adorned compositions.

title: Hollywood Cinematic Editorial: Wet Skin, Water Droplets & Rembrandt Lighting Portrait Prompt
description: A high-fashion editorial prompt transforming any selfie into a dramatic cinematic portrait — naturally wet skin, water droplets on sunglasses, low-key Rembrandt lighting, and a fitted black turtleneck against a dark minimalist background. Performs exceptionally well on Grok/Flux and GPT Image models with explicit identity-preservation guardrails and micro-detail specifications for pores, knuckles, and fabric texture.

title: SHOTLINE: Storyboard-Driven AI Video Prompting with Panoramic Blocking Charts
description: A pre-visualization technique for AI video that generates panoramic blocking charts mapping entire scenes before writing prompts — characters repeated at key beats with numbered nodes, timecodes, and camera notes embedded in the image. Feeding this chart to an LLM produces timed, segmented prompts that dramatically improve consistency for long takes on Kling, Runway, and Hailuo. Includes character cards, first-frame/last-frame locking, and explicit physics descriptions.

title: Structured Video Scene Formula: Subject → Action → Context → Style for Kling & Runway
description: A disciplined prompt template enforcing strict ordering — Subject (appearance, clothing, features), Action (one clear movement), Context (3-5 key elements max), and Style (camera, lighting, mood, film references) — to reduce drift and improve coherence in AI video generation. Paired with segment timestamps, explicit camera directions, and heavy negative prompts. The formula is part of a broader toolkit from @creatorslop covering character cards, style anchoring, and multi-shot sequences.

title: 1,446 Open-Source Trending AI Image Prompts — GPT Image 2 & NanoBanana Library with MCP Server
description: A free GitHub repository containing 1,446+ viral AI image prompts for GPT Image 2 and NanoBanana, all auto-categorized with system prompts and a companion MCP server included. GPT Image 2 entries lean toward posters, typography, and multi-panel storyboards while NanoBanana focuses on portraits and product shots — all in JSON, ranked by likes, and updated weekly under CC BY 4.0 license.

title: Production-Grade Agent Prompt Structure: Stop Chatting, Ship Autonomous Workflows
description: A prompt architecture designed for production AI agents that need to move beyond conversational chat into reliable autonomous workflows. The structure enforces modular skill composition, structured output, and verification gates — drawing from real-world production lessons shared across r/AI_Agents and the n8n automation community. The template is part of a 3-post series on the transition from prompt engineering to agent engineering.
